title: NacgVuln: Negative-aware and Chunk-enhanced Generative Line-level Vulnerability Localization

creators.name: Huang, Shuai
creators.affiliation: School of Computer Science and Engineering, Sichuan University of Science & Engineering, Yibin 644000, China

description: Replication package for NacgVuln, a negative-aware and chunk-enhanced generative framework for line-level vulnerability localization. The archive contains source code, configuration files, documentation, and processed experimental results. Model checkpoints and third-party Big-Vul CSV files are not distributed and must be regenerated or obtained from their documented sources.
notes: Pretrained and fine-tuned model checkpoints are intentionally excluded. Reproduction starts from the documented public CodeT5-base and CodeBERT-base models.
